meaning: n.关系,联系,叙述,故事,亲戚
examples: It is a question of the relation of ethics to economics.
The relation that exists when opposites cannot coexist.
The relation between employees and employers is becoming tense.
Neoclassical economic theory says that optimum results are achieved when the relation is close.
The National Commission may undertake the following due diligence in relation to applicants for Grant funding.
